tweets.text:
Our agency welcomes President Trump and the new administration today.  

📣U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement is committed to protecting the people of the United States by:  
📌Enforcing immigration law  
📌Preserving national security and public safety 

#InaugurationDay https://t.co/oLKzjNiOUu

tweets.text:
Great work by @EROBoston who got this threat back off the streets after he was released into the community instead of being held on an immigration detainer! 

Learn how ICE detainers keep communities and #LawEnforcement officers safer: https://t.co/BIHWZp5m1Z 

#PublicSafety

🔥 Sending thoughts and prayers to those affected by LA County fires—and to those helping! 👨‍🚒👩‍🚒
